official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound custom_chat_completions packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official custom_chat_completions body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound custom_chat_completions frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns custom_chat_completions immediately after cooldown.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the custom_chat_completions id to ClientboundCustomChatCompletionsPacket.
The official body is Action enum followed by a VarInt-sized UTF-8 string list.
The fixture uses ClientboundCustomChatCompletionsPacket(Action, List<String>), so it does not require initialized chat UI, command context, player, level, registry, or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded action, decoded entries, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove chat UI behavior, command context behavior, completion lifecycle semantics, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer chat UI behavior, command context behavior, completion lifecycle semantics, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
